name: Sweet Graham Snacks
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 15x10x1-inch baking pan with graham crackers.
2. In a saucepan, bring butter and sugar to a boil; boil for two minutes.
3. Remove from heat; stir in nuts.
4. Spoon over graham crackers.
5. Bake at 325°F for 10 minutes.
6. Immediately remove from pan onto foil.
7. Cool.
8. Break apart.
